# Insert X=55, before (slide 60). Order m=3.
#
#                       [30]                      a (root)
#                     /      \
#                 [20]        [40]                b   c
#                /    \       /    \
#          [10,15]  [25] [35,38]  [45,50]         d  e  f  g
root 1
1  1  2  30 3
2  1  4  20 5
3  1  6  40 7
4  2  0  10 0  15 0
5  1  0  25 0
6  2  0  35 0  38 0
7  2  0  45 0  50 0
